notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.inbox_lead: All messages sent to your account.
notifications.branches_hint: Leave empty to include every branch. Selecting one or more limits recipients to those branches.
notifications.roles_hint: Recipients are users who have any of the selected roles (union).

dashboard.showcase_body: Local fixtures — W-5.8 swaps these for real BI data.
dashboard.mini_form_body: Type an amount — display is ar-EG locale; canonical value is backend q2.

form.unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

table.label: Data table
table.empty_body: Try adjusting the filters or reloading.
table.error_body: Something went wrong while fetching data.

toasts.backup_started: Backup started. Status will update shortly.

errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired, please sign in again.
errors.permission_denied: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests — please try again shortly.
errors.validation_phone_ly: Enter a valid Libyan phone number: 09, then 1–5, then seven digits (10 digits total).
errors.validation_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.validation_generic: Invalid input. Please check the value and try again.
errors.request_failed: Request failed. Please review the details and try again.
errors.request_timeout: The server took too long to respond. Check your connection and try again.

clientValidation.lines_required: Add at least one line (product, quantity, unit).
clientValidation.unit_cost_required: Enter a unit cost greater than zero.
clientValidation.qty_required: Enter a quantity greater than zero.
clientValidation.missing_po_branch: Purchase order has no branch — cannot receive.
clientValidation.receive_lines_required: Enter quantity and cost for at least one line.
clientValidation.unresolved_variant: Complete variant selection for every line.

apiErrors.onboarding_assignee_ineligible: The selected reviewer must be an active user with permission to manage onboarding and employee records.
apiErrors.control_account_posting: Cannot post to a summary (control) account; use a leaf posting account (e.g. 2010 Trade Payables).
apiErrors.variant_inventory_activity: Cannot remove variant "{{label}}" because it is linked to inventory activity.
apiErrors.insufficient_transfer_stock: Insufficient available stock at the sending branch.
apiErrors.insufficient_transfer_reserved: Insufficient reserved stock for this transfer — stock may have changed after the transfer was created.
apiErrors.transfer_qty_positive: Transfer quantity must be greater than zero.
apiErrors.transfer_same_branch: Source and destination branches must be different.
apiErrors.transfer_no_lines: Add at least one line to the transfer.
apiErrors.transfer_variant_product_mismatch: Variant does not match the product.
apiErrors.transfer_not_pending_dispatch: Only transfers awaiting dispatch can be sent.
apiErrors.transfer_dispatch_wrong_branch: Dispatch must be performed at the sending branch.
apiErrors.transfer_not_in_transit: Only in-transit shipments can be received.
apiErrors.transfer_receive_wrong_branch: Receipt must be performed at the receiving branch.
apiErrors.transfer_cancel_not_pending: Cancellation is only allowed before dispatch.
apiErrors.transfer_update_not_pending: Updates are only allowed before dispatch.
apiErrors.transfer_cancel_wrong_branch: Cancellation must be performed at the sending branch.
apiErrors.qty_signed_required_count_adjust: Signed quantity is required for count adjustment.
apiErrors.reserve_movement_id_required: Reserve movement ID is required for release.
apiErrors.quantity_positive_required: Quantity must be a positive integer.
apiErrors.release_branch_product_mismatch: Release must match the reserved branch, product, and variant.
apiErrors.release_qty_exceeds_open: Cannot release more than the open reserved quantity.
apiErrors.insufficient_sellable_stock_damage_mark: Insufficient sellable stock to mark as damaged.
apiErrors.unit_cost_required_add_stock: Unit cost is required and must be positive when adding stock.
apiErrors.stock_count_cannot_edit_posted: Cannot edit a posted stock count session.
apiErrors.stock_count_already_posted: Stock count session is already posted.
apiErrors.stock_count_cancelled_cannot_post: Cannot post a cancelled stock count session.
apiErrors.stock_count_incomplete_lines: Complete actual count for every line before posting.
apiErrors.receipt_no_lines_required: Add at least one receipt line.
apiErrors.supplier_email_missing: Add an email address on the supplier profile before sending.
apiErrors.supplier_id_required_for_send: Link this purchase order to a supplier record before sending.
apiErrors.email_delivery_failed: Could not deliver email. Check SMTP settings and try again.
apiErrors.idempotency_key_too_short: Idempotency key must be at least 8 characters.
apiErrors.idempotency_key_po_mismatch: Idempotency key already used for a different purchase order.
apiErrors.po_status_cannot_receive: Cannot receive goods for this purchase order status.
apiErrors.po_branch_mismatch: Branch must match the purchase order branch.
apiErrors.receipt_line_invalid: Each line needs purchase order line ID and quantity.
apiErrors.receipt_variant_id_invalid: Variant ID must be an integer when provided.
apiErrors.receipt_unit_cost_required: Unit cost is required for each receipt line.
apiErrors.receipt_unit_cost_invalid: Unit cost must be a positive number.
apiErrors.receipt_qty_exceeds_ordered: Received quantity exceeds ordered quantity for the line.
apiErrors.po_variant_mismatch: Variant does not match the PO line preset variant.
apiErrors.po_variant_required: Variant is required when the PO line has no preset variant.
apiErrors.inventory_movement_conflict: Inventory movement conflict. Please try again.
apiErrors.branch_closed: Branch is closed; inventory operations are not allowed.
apiErrors.branch_archived: Branch is archived and cannot be used for this operation.
apiErrors.stock_delta_zero: At least one stock delta must be non-zero.
apiErrors.stock_update_conflict: Stock update conflict. Please try again.
apiErrors.stock_levels_negative: Stock levels cannot be negative — insufficient quantity to complete this sale.
apiErrors.stock_reserved_exceeds_on_hand: Reserved plus damaged cannot exceed on-hand quantity.
apiErrors.shift_not_found: Shift not found, does not belong to this device, or is not open.
apiErrors.product_no_sellable_price: This product has no sellable price.
apiErrors.product_invalid_sellable_price: This product has an invalid sellable price.
apiErrors.pos_discount_reserved: This discount code is reserved for loyalty redemption.
apiErrors.pos_discount_already_applied: This discount code is already applied to the cart.
apiErrors.checkout_empty_cart: Cannot lock checkout for an empty cart.
apiErrors.payroll_no_branch: Employee has no branch — assign a branch on the user profile.
apiErrors.payroll_no_schedule: No weekly work schedule — add one on the employee schedule page.
apiErrors.payroll_no_pay_rate: Set a base salary or hourly rate on the employee profile.
apiErrors.payroll_negative_net: Net pay is negative for this period — review attendance, absences, and deductions.
